title: Comparison of Dexmedetomidine and Propofol on the Delirium and Neuroinflammation in Patients With SIRS.
text:
Summary: Assessment of sedative effects of dexmedetomidine and propofol on the clinical course of delirium and neuroinflammation in patients with SIRS using CAM-ICU scale and protein S100b in serum.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 presence of delirium 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 presence of Alzheimer's disease 

 any mental disorder 

 presence of cancer
